upcomingEvents.title: HackSussex 2026
upcomingEvents.description:
HackSussex 2026 is almost upon us! This unique event is hosted over a full weekend, including 24 hours of non-stop coding, workshops hosted by our sponsors, 4 mouth-wateringly tasty meals from local Brighton caterers, snacks and drinks, and an exclusive 2025 t-shirt, all for free!

Your project can enter multiple of our many prize tracks. If you donГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В™t have a team, find your family-for-the-weekend in our team building event! Together youГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В™ll create a game, some software or something electronic. Have you never coded before? Have you been coding since before you were conceived? Are you competitive? Are you laid back? Want to boost your CV while having fun? Join us for our best Hackathon yet ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В“ you wonГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В™t want to miss this!

pastEvents.title: HackSussex 2023
pastEvents.description:
This is an opportunity for students of all abilities to collaborate, learn new skills, and build something cool using technology. It's a great way for people with similar interests to work together on exciting projects in a fast-paced, creative environment.

24 Hours of project buildingГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚Вѓ
Win exciting prizesГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚Вѓ
Free swagГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚Вѓ
Free Food and DrinksГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚Вѓ
Workshops to learn skillsГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚Вѓ

This year HackSussex 2023 is going Hybrid!
In addition to the in-person experience, you will be able to take part online! Thanks to our partners at the Media Technology Lab, we will be running a professional live stream throughout the event to allow our digital attendees to ask questions, speak to sponsors, attend workshops and take part in the hack!


Code of Conduct 
HackSussex 2023 is run in accordance with the MLH Code of Conduct and the Hackathons UK Code of Conduct.

pastEvents.title: Coders Cup 2023
pastEvents.description:
Join us once again for our annual programming competition, the Coders' Cup! Livestreamed from the campus studio we bring you a number of experienced serious programmers battling each other to see who is the best competitive programmer that sussex can offer.
Want to come watch for yourself? This event will be livestreamed on our youtube and a small number of seats will be available in the studio on the day for friends and family of our competitors.

pastEvents.title: Game Jam 2023
pastEvents.description:
This is an opportunity for students of all abilities to collaborate, learn new skills, and build something cool using technology. It's a great way for people with similar interests to work together on exciting projects in a fast-paced, creative environment. HackSussex Game Jam is a fun and inclusive weekend-long event that invites participants to team up and build their own video games in just a short span of time. It's an incredible chance to meet like-minded individuals, develop your skills, and have a blast doing it.

- 24 Hours of project buildingГўВЂВѓ
- Win exciting prizesГўВЂВѓ
- Free swagГўВЂВѓ
- Free Food and DrinksГўВЂВѓ
- Workshops to learn skillsГўВЂВѓ

Code of Conduct 
HackSussex Game Jam 2023 is run in accordance with the MLH Code of Conduct and the Hackathons UK Code of Conduct.

pastEvents.title: HackSussex 2024
pastEvents.description:
Our annual hackathon. Join us for a free weekend of coding, eating and winning prizes! Every year, HackSussex hosts its main event, the hackathon! We provide a free event for students and graduates to stretch their skills and win prizes across a wide range of technical areas, such as robotics, fintech, artificial intelligence, games development and more. Meals are provided throughout the event to ensure our hackers are well fed and powered up to produce the best projects over the course of a weekend. Once submission close, each team will present their project to our panel of judges to decide who will win each track, along with the grand prize winner of the entire hackathon.

This is an opportunity for students of all abilities to collaborate, learn new skills, and build something cool using technology. It's a great way for people with similar interests to work together on exciting projects in a fast-paced, creative environment.

- 24 Hours of project buildingГўВЂВѓ
- Win exciting prizesГўВЂВѓ
- Free swagГўВЂВѓ
- Free Food and DrinksГўВЂВѓ
- Workshops to learn skillsГўВЂВѓ

Code of Conduct 
HackSussex 2024 is run in accordance with the MLH Code of Conduct and the Hackathons UK Code of Conduct.

pastEvents.title: Coders Cup 2024
pastEvents.description:
The Coders Cup is HackSussex's algorithmic coding competition for students! The live finals are where we place the top 8 of our qualifiers against each other to win the grand prizes! The competition is for undergraduate students to test their programming skills in a fun and exciting way whilst under the pressure of a live show.

This year is the 4th year of the Coders Cup!
